coverage_summary: The improved test cases provide solid coverage for the core functional requirement (FR001), business rules (BR001, BR002), and validations (VAL001, VAL002). Boundary testing for password length is well-covered (TC006, TC007, TC008). Security coverage includes a concurrent registration test (TC009) addressing the identified risk (RISK001). Additional negative tests for duplicate email variations (case sensitivity, spaces, special characters, deleted accounts, retry scenarios) enhance validation coverage. However, gaps remain in email format validation, password complexity (uppercase, numbers, special characters), account verification/confirmation, error message localization, and performance/stress testing beyond concurrency.
remaining_gaps: No test cases for email format validation (e.g., missing '@', invalid domain, special characters in local part).
No test cases for password complexity requirements (uppercase, lowercase, numbers, special characters) as these are not specified but are common security practices.
No test cases for account creation confirmation or verification process (e.g., email verification link).
No test cases for error handling and user feedback for edge cases like network timeout or server error.
No test cases for password hashing or storage security (e.g., verifying password is not stored in plain text).
No test cases for maximum password length or other boundary values beyond the minimum.
No test cases for SQL injection or XSS in email or password fields.
No test cases for rate limiting or brute force protection on account creation.
No test cases for accessibility (e.g., screen reader compatibility for error messages).
No test cases for internationalization (e.g., non-ASCII characters in email or password).
recommendations: Add test cases for email format validation (e.g., missing '@', invalid domain, special characters).
Clarify password complexity requirements and add corresponding test cases (uppercase, numbers, special characters).
Add test cases for account verification/confirmation process if applicable.
Add test cases for error handling under network failures or server errors.
Add test cases for maximum password length and other boundary values.
Add security test cases for SQL injection, XSS, and rate limiting.
Add test cases for password storage security (e.g., verify hashing).
Consider adding performance/stress tests for concurrent registrations beyond 5 requests.
Add test cases for accessibility and internationalization if required.
